summary: Completed iCal & Admin Dashboard testing. Backend APIs 100% pass (12/12 tests). Frontend UI verified - stats display correct values, Activity button leads to logs, Sync All works with auto-refresh, logs table has all required columns

minor.issue: Was using invalid enum value 'DELETED' for listing_status - FIXED by changing to .eq('status', 'ACTIVE')

issues: Table header says 'Время' (Time) not 'Timestamp' as specified in requirements - cosmetic only

critical_code_review_comments: Telegram alert logic for >5 errors is implemented correctly in backend but not testable without real iCal sources
updated_files: /app/app/api/v2/admin/ical/route.js - Fixed DELETED enum error to use .eq('status', 'ACTIVE')
seed_data_creation: Test data in ical_sync_logs: 2 success entries (Luxury Villa Ocean View), 1 error entry (Beach House - HTTP 404)
context_for_next_testing_agent: iCal Admin APIs fully functional. GET /api/v2/admin/ical returns logs with listing_title field and accurate 24h stats. POST actions: get_sync_enabled lists ACTIVE listings with sync_settings, sync_all triggers sync for all active sources. Frontend pages /admin/system/ical and /admin/system/ical/logs fully working with stats cards, Sync All button, errors-only filter, and CSV export.

backend: GET /api/v2/admin/ical - returns logs with listing_title, stats (total_24h, success_24h, errors_24h)
GET /api/v2/admin/ical?errors_only=true - filters to error logs only
POST /api/v2/admin/ical action=sync_all - triggers sync, returns total/synced/errors/duration
POST /api/v2/admin/ical action=get_sync_enabled - returns ACTIVE listings with sync_settings
Auth check - returns 403 for unauthenticated requests
frontend: /admin/system/ical - displays stats cards with actual numbers (3/2/1)
/admin/system/ical - Sync All button triggers sync and auto-refreshes stats
/admin/system/ical - Shows last sync result card after Sync All
